arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner Shares Adam Wharton Injury Update Ahead of Liverpool Clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner revealed that Adam Wharton is still struggling for fitness ahead of the Eagles' weekend clash against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool suffer fatal transfer blow as six-year contract 'agreed'
arts.sum: Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon reportedly agrees a new six-year contract with the Magpies, ending speculation over his future amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool eye Bundesliga star as Mohamed Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool have scouted Borussia Dortmund winger Karim Adeyemi and are prepared to pay up to €50m (£41.9m) in a future transfer, according to a report. Liverpool are said to have sent scouts to watch the Germany international in the Bundesliga and have outlined the €50m transfer fee they are willing to pay to secure a deal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool given final Darwin Nunez verdict as Arne Slot seeks central striker solution
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Joe Rimmer, Amie Wilson, Mark Wakefield, Keifer MacDonald, Kieran King, Isaac Johnson, Richard Garnett)
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez's Liverpool future has come under question after another below-par performance during their win against Bologna in the Champions League at Anfield

arts.ttl: Latest Liverpool injury news before Crystal Palace as Federico Chiesa decision expected
arts.sum: Liverpool injury news ahead of Premier League clash against Crystal Palace with updates on Federico Chiesa and Harvey Elliott

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold keeping his word but Liverpool fear could soon be realised
arts.sum: The clock continues to tick on Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool contract which runs out next summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds unlikely to move for £70m-rated Marc Guehi
arts.sum: Liverpool are not expected to move for £70m-rated Crystal Palace centre-back Marc Guehi

arts.ttl: Arne Slot training change could prove popular after Liverpool players asked Jurgen Klopp for switch
arts.sum: The Dutchman has made an excellent start to life at Anfield and one tweak in particular could make the difference this weekend

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson makes surprise return to Liverpool and receives a warm welcome from his former team-mates just over a year after his controversial Saudi Arabia move
arts.sum: Former Liverpool captain Jordan Henderson made a surprise appearance at the Reds' AXA Training Centre on Friday.

arts.ttl: ‘Very close’: Virgil van Dijk says £4m player is his best friend at Liverpool now
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk is one of the most popular figures in the Liverpool dressing room. As the club captain, it’s a pre-requisite that Van Dijk...
